scopeBoundary: This artifact prepares future architecture checks for repository governance only. It does not redefine authoritative dependency edges and does not enforce package imports in Phase 0.

futureCheckClasses.description: Future package-boundary checks should verify that later layers depend only on allowed earlier layers.

Future checks should reject kernel imports from delivery frameworks, model providers, network services, GitHub-specific code, MCP-specific code, orchestration, language parsers, and target build tools.
Future checks should reject contracts importing kernel, orchestration, delivery, adapter, or inference implementations.
Future checks should verify that inference packages are not imported by kernel, policy evaluation, evidence satisfaction, or bundle finalization paths.
Future checks should detect delivery surfaces defining private Verdict, Evidence, Evidence Requirement, Policy, Rule, or Evidence Bundle concepts.

nonEnforcementStatement: No production package layout currently exists, so FND-MECH-001 does not implement package import dependency enforcement.
